infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ECHO iPhone uses the camera to scan ECHO pairing QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ECHO iPhone saves a NetEase sign-in QR code so it can be selected in the NetEase scanner.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: ECHO iPhone connects to ECHO NEXT on your local network for playback control and library browsing.
